title: Rob Walls
compiled_truth: Rob Walls is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-23), Rob Walls sent 85 and received 455 emails, totalling 540 interactions. Top correspondents: [James Derrick](people/james-derrick) (49), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (10), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (10), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (7), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (5).
